pi_items.source: setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 136-139 explicitly create a project with name 'TailwindTraders' via POST to /TailwindTraders/_apis/projects. Verified by configuration in setup_task.ps1 hooks (task.json line 13) and other task configurations in the same environment that consistently reference TailwindTraders project

Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly states: 'Create a new secure Pipeline Environment named Production (case-sensitive)'. Azure DevOps Pipeline Environments documentation (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/pipelines/process/environments?view=azure-devops) confirms this is a standard Azure DevOps feature. 'Production' is a conventional environment name used in deployment pipelines and other Azure DevOps tasks in this environment (e.g., create_release_pipeline task)

Microsoft Learn documentation on team creation (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/settings/add-teams?view=azure-devops) states: 'Each new project includes a default team named after the project'. When TailwindTraders project is created by setup_azure_devops.ps1, Azure DevOps automatically creates the default team '[ProjectName] Team'. Verified by consistent usage of 'TailwindTraders Team' across multiple task configurations in this environment (e.g., configure_team_sprint_settings, configure_team_alerts tasks)

pi_items.metadata_value: Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.
pi_items.verified_value: Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.
pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly specifies: 'Add the following instructions for the approvers: Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.' This is custom task-specific text provided in the task requirements

privileged_info_summary: The setup_prod_environment_gate task requires creating a Pipeline Environment in Azure DevOps for the TailwindTraders project. The environment must be named 'Production' (case-sensitive). The task requires configuring manual approval via the Approvals and checks feature, with the TailwindTraders Team designated as the approver group. Approvers must see the instruction text: 'Verify changelog and smoke test results before approving.' The TailwindTraders Team is the default team automatically created when the TailwindTraders project is established by the environment setup scripts.
